name: storydex-desktop
description: Storydex desktop development shell based on Electron

scripts.build:desktop: npm run build:frontend && npm run sync:assets && set ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/&& electron-builder --dir --win --config.win.signAndEditExecutable=false && npm run patch:win-exe
scripts.package:win: npm run build:desktop && set ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/&& electron-builder --win nsis --prepackaged release\win-unpacked --config.win.signAndEditExecutable=false
